title: First-Time Buyer Roadmap
problem: Buying your first home is overwhelming. Between saving for a deposit, understanding mortgages, navigating solicitors, and managing the chain of events that leads to completion, it's easy to feel lost. Most first-time buyers waste time and money due to simple mistakes that could have been avoided with proper planning.
includes: Complete step-by-step timeline from saving to completion
Budget template for all buying costs
Common pitfalls and how to avoid them
audience: First-time buyers in England or Wales who want a clear, structured approach to purchasing their first property. Ideal if you're in the early planning stages or actively looking.
